bootCheck.description: Command(s) that load the FULL application context with EAGER bean creation (or boot to a health endpoint) — e.g. a @SpringBootTest(webEnvironment=NONE) context-load test selector. Declaring it marks the nature as context-bearing and makes gate G7b (sc-implement) required on every NON-inert change to the nature's production sources, catching framework-wiring breaks (a new type caught by an unchanged scan, bean-scope clashes, missing-property conditionals) that unit + sliced-IT + review all pass yet fail to boot. Prefer the cheap eager context-load kept as a standing suite test; an expensive full-server boot belongs in sc-qa (G9). Needs a full-context-capable env (a superset of the sliced ITs'). A selector matching zero tests is a misconfig FAIL, not a pass. Never wire an env-dependent boot into a CI path lacking its deps.

securityReviewModel.description: Model id the 'security' and 'authz' review lenses MUST use, overriding their tier-resolved model. Set it when your top/high tier resolves to a model that refuses security analysis — such a review silently no-ops. Pin the most capable model that WILL do security review, at your HIGHEST security-review tier — note auth/payment risk upgrades that lens to 'top', and the pin overrides that upgrade too. Enforced when sc-review spawns those lenses; PREFLIGHT records it as models['review.security'] and logs SC-ROUTE-AVOID when the pin differs from the tier-resolved model. Opt-in: absent, the security lens uses its tier model.

reuseDevServer.description: Reuse an already-running dev server for QA. A bare port number, an object with an explicit health check, or true to auto-detect a running server.

oneOf.description: Auto-detect: reuse whatever dev server is already up.
